hooks.command: herdr notification show 'Claude Code' --body '許可が必要です' --sound request 2>/dev/null || true

input=$(cat); if [ "$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.stop_hook_active // false')" = "true" ]; then exit 0; fi; herdr notification show 'Claude Code' --body '作業が完了しました' --sound done 2>/dev/null || true

statusLine.command: input=$(cat); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.cwd'); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name // .model.id // empty'); cost=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.cost.total_cost_usd // empty'); added=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.cost.total_lines_added // 0'); removed=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.cost.total_lines_removed // 0'); dur_ms=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.cost.total_duration_ms // 0'); exceeds=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.exceeds_200k_tokens // false'); user=$(whoami); host=$(hostname -s); display_dir="${cwd/#$HOME/~}"; git_info=""; if git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then branch=$(git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo ""); if [ -n "$branch" ]; then dirty=""; staged=""; untracked=""; if ! git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks diff --quiet 2>/dev/null; then dirty="*"; fi; if ! git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null; then staged="+"; fi; if [ -n "$(git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks ls-files --others --exclude-standard 2>/dev/null)" ]; then untracked="%"; fi; git_info=" $(printf '\033[38;5;208m')($branch$dirty$staged$untracked)$(printf '\033[0m')"; fi; fi; model_info=""; if [ -n "$model" ]; then model_info=" $(printf '\033[38;5;141m')[$model]$(printf '\033[0m')"; fi; usage_info=""; if [ -n "$cost" ]; then cost_fmt=$(printf '%.2f' "$cost"); dur_min=$(awk -v ms="$dur_ms" 'BEGIN{printf "%.1f", ms/60000}'); diff_info=""; if [ "$added" != "0" ] || [ "$removed" != "0" ]; then diff_info=" $(printf '\033[32m')+${added}$(printf '\033[0m')/$(printf '\033[31m')-${removed}$(printf '\033[0m')"; fi; ctx_flag=""; if [ "$exceeds" = "true" ]; then ctx_flag=" $(printf '\033[1;33m')⚠200k$(printf '\033[0m')"; fi; usage_info=" $(printf '\033[38;5;244m')\$${cost_fmt} ${dur_min}m$(printf '\033[0m')${diff_info}${ctx_flag}"; fi; printf "%s@%s $(printf '\033[34m')%s$(printf '\033[0m')%s%s%s " "$user" "$host" "$display_dir" "$git_info" "$model_info" "$usage_info"
